name: Set of 2 Upholstered with Metal Base Dining Chair Chairs Cream Boucle - Room Essentials™
description:
Bring a sophisticated feel to your dining space with the 2-Piece Upholstered with Metal Base Dining Chairs from Room Essentials™. This dining chair set features cream boucle upholstery that complements the black metal frame for a sleek look. Boasting an armless design, this upholstered dining chair set helps you sit comfortably as you enjoy a good meal.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Overall Depth: 20 11/16 inches
Overall Width: 18 1/8 inches
Overall Height: 32 1/8 inches
Seat Depth: 18 5/16 inches
Seat height: 18 5/16 inches
Back Width: 16 1/8 inches
Back Height: 14 3/16inches
Width between front leg: 17 5/16inches
